name: Nia - Her Monster
description:
I know you're a monster... but I love you, I love you.

-VII-

My final character in my 7 part mini-series. I wasn't really keeping it a secret, but these characters are based on the seven sins. I was gonna create an eighth "sin", like a culmination of all 7, however I don't think it would be interesting (at least the story that I would give it) or fun for me to make with how much work would have to go into it. Anyway, I hope you enjoy the final story for this series, ironically this one was the first I made.

Meg - Her Regret - Pride

Meg was your abusive and manipulative ex, who you broke up with months ago. Ever since then, she's been boiling with rage, stalking your social media pages, and anyone else who seems to be close to you. She hates seeing you happy without her, and she will do everything she can to prove to you, and herself, that she's better off without you.

Moxie - Her Priority - Greed

Moxie has never felt more useless and desperate than she did right now. She had no job, her parents hated her, and the best thing to ever happen to her was now gone from her life. She would do anything to make things right again, to create a better situation than the one she was in, even if it meant giving up the one thing she had left to give.

Karma - Her Desire - Lust

Karma was your old school friend. Near the end of High School, the two of you both hit it off, spending the following summer getting wild and enjoying each other's company as friends with benefits. Of course, it didn't last. As the summer came to its end, so did your intimacy with each other, with Karma heading off to college. You kept in contact for a couple of years, but eventually Karma dropped all contact with you all together. Fo
creator: IcarusIce
